---
title: "Teaching"
pagetitle: "Teaching — Félix P. Leiva"
description: "Courses, supervision, and workshops."
toc: true
toc-location: right
---

## Workshops

::: {.teach-card}

### {{< fa chalkboard-user >}} Reproducible analyses with R, Quarto and `renv`

**Radboud Doctoral School · 2024 (1-day workshop, ~20 participants)**

A hands-on workshop showing PhD students how to structure a research project so that any collaborator (or future-them) can rerun the entire analysis from raw data to figures with one command.

**Topics covered**

- Project layout: `data/raw`, `data/processed`, `R/`, `outputs/`, `manuscript/`
- Pinning package versions with [`renv`](https://rstudio.github.io/renv/)
- Numbered analysis scripts and the "no magic numbers" rule
- Building manuscripts and supplementary materials with [Quarto](https://quarto.org)
- Pushing to GitHub and archiving with Zenodo for a citable DOI

**Materials** — [github.com/felixpleiva/Template_for_publications](https://github.com/felixpleiva/Template_for_publications)

::: {.proj-buttons}
[Slides](#){.proj-btn}
[Repo](https://github.com/felixpleiva/Template_for_publications){.proj-btn}
:::

:::

<!--
Add a new workshop or course by copying the block above:

::: {.teach-card}
### {{< fa chalkboard-user >}} Title of the activity
**Institution · Year (format, audience size)**

Short description.

**Topics covered**
- ...
- ...
:::
-->

## Courses

- **2024 – 2025** — Guest lecturer, *Animal Ecophysiology* (BSc), Radboud University.
- **2014 – 2017** — Lecturer, *Marine Biology* and *Animal Physiology*, Universidad de los Lagos (Puerto Montt, Chile).

## Supervision

- **2025** — MSc thesis: *Cell size effects on heat tolerance in Drosophila*. Radboud University. (co-supervisor)
- **2024** — BSc thesis: *Variation in oxygen tolerance across populations of fruit flies*. Radboud University.
- **2016 – 2017** — Three BSc theses on crustacean physiology, Universidad de los Lagos.
